summary: Phase 1+2A Partner Billing System testing. All 35 backend tests pass (100%). All core features working correctly: Free Trial plan seed, is_public flag, public plans endpoint, auto-assign on signup, reset to Free Trial on cancel, audit logs, and billing service functions. Fixed a minor UI bug in AuditLogDialog (Invalid Date display).

ui_bugs.issue: Dates showed 'Invalid Date' because component used log.created_at but audit_trail collection stores occurred_at
ui_bugs.status: FIXED — updated to use log.occurred_at || log.created_at

feature_test_results.free_trial_plan_seed: PASS — GET /api/admin/plans returns Free Trial with is_default=true, is_public=false, all limits=10
feature_test_results.is_public_flag_on_create: PASS — POST /api/admin/plans with is_public:true saves and returns is_public=true
feature_test_results.public_plans_endpoint: PASS — GET /api/partner/plans/public works, returns empty array (Free Trial is not public), no auth needed
feature_test_results.auto_assign_free_trial_signup: PASS — POST /api/auth/register-partner creates tenant with license.plan_id=Free Trial plan ID and plan_name='Free Trial'
feature_test_results.reset_to_free_trial_on_cancel: PASS — PATCH /api/admin/partner-subscriptions/{id}/cancel resets tenant license to Free Trial with max_users=10
feature_test_results.partner_orgs_audit_logs: PASS — GET /api/admin/audit-logs?entity_type=tenant&entity_id={id} returns audit logs, AuditLogDialog opens in-place (not navigating to wrong tab)
feature_test_results.billing_service_functions: PASS — calculate_prorata, calculate_upgrade_prorata, next_first_of_month all exist and compute correct values

action_items: MINOR: PlansTab.tsx form does not expose is_public toggle — admin cannot set a plan as public via the UI. They must use the API directly. Consider adding a 'Visible to partners for self-service upgrade' checkbox to the New Plan / Edit Plan form.
INFO: AuditLogDialog date display bug was fixed in this iteration (occurred_at fallback added)
critical_code_review_comments: PlansTab.tsx Plan type and form helpers do not include is_public field (lines 19-43, 76-101). Backend supports it but UI form doesn't expose it — admin has no way to set is_public=true via the admin panel UI.

cancel_partner_subscription uses `await _reset_partner_to_free_trial(sub.get("partner_id", "") if sub else "")` — note: the `sub` variable is re-fetched from DB just before this call, so this is correct.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (AuditLogDialog date bug fixed, is_public toggle missing in Plans form)

seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_ partner orgs during test run (TEST_Auto Assign Org and TEST_Cancel Org), both on Free Trial plan
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 1+2A backend features verified: Free Trial auto-seed, is_public flag via API, public plans endpoint, auto-assign on partner signup, reset to Free Trial on cancel, audit logs endpoint. AuditLogDialog date display was fixed (occurred_at). Main outstanding UI gap: PlansTab.tsx form missing is_public toggle. 2 test orgs in DB: test-auto-assign-org-* and test-cancel-org-*.
